title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 214.516 - Registration as an endowed care cemetery, when — compliance with endowed care cemetery law required
text:
214.516.  Registration as an endowed care cemetery, when — compliance with endowed care cemetery law required. — Any cemetery owner subsequent to a city, regardless of whether such cemetery was previously registered as an endowed care cemetery, held itself out to be an endowed care cemetery or was a nonendowed care cemetery, shall comply with section 214.310 and register such cemetery as an endowed care cemetery as if it were a newly created cemetery with no interments at the time of such registration.  Any contracts for the right of burial sold after compliance with section 214.310 and all subsequent action of a subsequent cemetery owner shall comply fully with the provisions of sections 214.270 to 214.410.
(L. 1997 H.B. 592 § 5 merged with S.B. 58 § 5, A.L. 2010 H.B. 1692, et al. merged with H.B. 2226, et al. merged with S.B. 754)
